response.justification: Strong individual contributor with 13+ years of software development experience and notable strengths in developer tooling, testing infrastructure, and CI/CD practices. However, the resume shows no formal people-management experience, no team leadership titles, and no mobile-platform ecosystem work at scale. The role explicitly requires 2+ years of people management and 3+ years of technical leadership, neither of which is demonstrably evidenced. Founding GISCollective and organizing workshops show initiative but do not substitute for managing engineers through performance reviews, 1:1s, and roadmaps.
strengths: 13+ years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and backend
Hands-on developer tooling and testing infrastructure work (Trial, Fluent-Asserts, CI/CD, Selenium course)
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, workshop instruction)
concerns: No demonstrated people-management experience (no direct reports, no 1:1s, no performance reviews)
No mobile-platform ecosystem experience at the scale implied by the role (iOS/Android build systems, large monorepos)
Currently on a career gap and most recent roles are IC-level, not management track

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and testing infrastructure background
